name: Brain MRI With Contrast
description: Standard brain MRI report template with intravenous contrast for enhanced evaluation of intracranial pathology

findings.technique: MRI of the brain was performed including T1-weighted, T2-weighted, FLAIR, diffusion-weighted, and susceptibility-weighted sequences. Post-contrast T1-weighted images were obtained in axial, coronal, and sagittal planes.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Pre-Contrast Sequences
sections.content: The pre-contrast sequences demonstrate [no mass lesion / no abnormal signal / no hemorrhage]. Gray-white matter differentiation is preserved.

sections.name: Post-Contrast T1-Weighted Imaging
sections.content: Following gadolinium administration, there is [no abnormal enhancement / no meningeal enhancement / no cranial nerve enhancement]. No parenchymal or periventricular enhancement identified.

sections.name: Ventricles
sections.content: The ventricular system is [normal in size / not dilated]. No intraventricular enhancement.

sections.name: Meninges
sections.content: The meninges demonstrate [no abnormal enhancement / no dural thickening / no leptomeningeal enhancement].

sections.name: Cranial Nerves
sections.content: The cranial nerves from CN I through CN XII demonstrate [no abnormal enhancement / are unremarkable]

sections.name: Pituitary Sella Region
sections.content: The pituitary gland is [normal in size / normal signal]. The sella turcica is [unremarkable]. No abnormal enhancement in the suprasellar region.

sections.name: Vascular
sections.content: The intracranial arteries are [unremarkable on TOF angiography / no aneurysm / no flow void abnormality]. The venous sinuses are patent.

sections.name: Orbits and Optic Nerves
sections.content: The orbits and optic nerves demonstrate [no abnormal enhancement / are unremarkable]. Retro-orbital fat is clear.

sections.name: Temporal Bones and IAC
sections.content: The internal auditory canals and temporal bones are [unremarkable]. The cochlear and vestibular structures demonstrate no abnormal enhancement.

impression:
1. Normal contrast-enhanced brain MRI.
2. No mass, infection, or inflammatory process identified.
3. No abnormal enhancement pattern to suggest neoplasm or infection.
author: RadReport Templates
